flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Pitzer College rose 29% between 2007 and 2010 ($8.5k → $11.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Pitzer College fell 29% between 2021 and 2024 (80.5% → 57.6%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Pitzer College rose 15% between 2007 and 2010 ($35.9k → $41.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Pitzer College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($58.0k → $65.2k).
